prompt: Create a realistic fashion editorial portrait of a young woman standing in a softly lit dressing room or vanity area. She has long straight dark brown hair with warm caramel ends worn loose over one shoulder, and her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular skin-tone blur block centered over the face. She wears a modest cream-colored long-sleeve maxi dress with a square neckline, fitted bodice, gathered waist, and a very full flowing skirt, covered in a delicate tiny floral print in muted pink, beige, and green. Pose her standing three-quarter front, left hand resting on a white-gray marble vanity counter, right hand lightly lifting the side of the skirt to show its volume. The setting is an elegant warm beige interior with a large mirror behind her framed by round vanity bulbs, a second mirror in the background, and a textured wall or column on the right. On the marble counter, include exactly three small perfume bottles sitting on one ornate gold tray: one amber bottle, one pink bottle, and one small clear-gold bottle. Use natural sunlight from the right, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, muted beige tones, realistic fabric folds, high-detail marble veining, and a vertical portrait composition. No visible readable text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated makeup, keep the face blur clean and featureless.
